text:
All clean. Here's what was upgraded:

**Scanner improvements:**
- **`buildVerdict()`** — new function that generates a single plain-English sentence explaining the most critical risk (e.g. "Cannot sell — funds will be trapped", "90% sell tax — effectively unsellable", "Creator controls >80% supply — extreme rug risk")
- **GoPlus extraction** now pulls: transfer tax, proxy flag, LP lock details (percent + expiry date), DEX name, top-10 holder concentration from the holders array, and LP top-10 concentration
- **Honeypot.is** expanded to Arbitrum + Polygon, now also checks max buy/sell limits (another honeypot signal)
- **Contract age** — new Step 6 queries block explorer APIs to get deployment timestamp, flags contracts deployed today (high), <7 days (medium), <30 days (low)
- **Tax thresholds** tightened: >20% sell tax → high risk, ≥90% → "unsellable" flag
- **Creator concentration** now has graduated thresholds: >30% medium, >80% high

**UI panel redesign:**
- **Verdict banner** at the top — one sentence, color-coded
- **Taxes section** — buy/sell/transfer shown inline with color coding (green/yellow/red by severity), source attribution
- **Holders section** — holder count, creator %, top-10 % each color-coded by threshold
- **Liquidity section** — shows DEX name, lock status with % and expiry date, or "No liquidity pool" in red
- **Contract section** — age, verified/unverified, mintable, proxy, pausable, balance-editable, hidden owner all as inline chips
- **Alerts section** — critical flags (honeypot, phishing, etc.) shown separately with ✕ prefix
